title: TaCZ: Leawind's Third Person Compats
description: Seamlessly integrate TACZ gunplay with Leawind's Third Person perspective.
body:
**Seamlessly integrate TACZ gunplay with Leawind's Third Person perspective.**

This is a compatibility mod designed to bridge the gap between [Timeless and Classics Zero (TACZ)](https://modrinth.com/mod/timeless-and-classics-zero) and [Leawind's Third Person](https://modrinth.com/mod/leawind-third-person). It ensures that your shooting experience remains accurate and immersive, even when playing in a modern third-person view.

### ✨ Features
* **Accurate Crosshair Alignment:** Fixes the offset issues where the crosshair and actual bullet trajectory wouldn't match in third-person mode.
* **Optimized Camera Behavior:** Smoothens the transition and positioning of the camera when Aiming Down Sights (ADS).
* **Immersive Combat:** Allows for a tactical "over-the-shoulder" shooter experience without the clunkiness of default camera logic.

### 🛠 Dependencies
To use this mod, the following are **required**:
1.  **Timeless and Classics Zero (TACZ)**
2.  **Leawind's Third Person**

### 📝 Installation
1.  Ensure you have both TACZ and Leawind's Third Person installed.
2.  Drop this compatibility mod into your `mods` folder.
3.  Configure your third-person settings as usual—the mod handles the synchronization in the background.

### 🔗 Links
* **Source Code:** [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/leva-nilla/TACZ-LeawindTPS-Compat)
* **Issue Tracker:** [Report bugs here](https://github.com/leva-nilla/TACZ-LeawindTPS-Compat/issues)
